title: Notera Clinical Note (Heidi-style template)
description: Canonical clinical-note schema matching the required Heidi template. STRICT RULE: only populate a field if it is explicitly mentioned in the transcript/context/clinical note; otherwise leave it blank (empty string / empty array). Never infer, summarise into, or invent content.

subjective.description: History of presenting complaint. Each field is free-form (use as many lines/bullets as needed); leave blank if not explicitly mentioned.

reason_for_visit.description: Reasons for presentation: requests, symptom complaints, discussion points.

hpi_details.description: Duration, timing, location, quality, severity and context of the presenting complaint.

aggravating_relieving_factors.description: Triggers/relieving factors, self-treatment attempts and their effectiveness.

symptom_progression.description: Changes in frequency, severity or pattern since onset.

previous_episodes.description: Prior similar episodes: timing, frequency, management, outcomes.

functional_impact.description: Impact on daily activities, work, school, social or self-care.

medical_surgical.description: Prior diagnoses, chronic conditions, hospitalisations, surgical interventions relevant to the presentation.

social.description: Lifestyle, occupation, living situation, substance use, social determinants.

family.description: Genetic/familial/hereditary conditions relevant to symptoms or risk.

exposure.description: Environmental, occupational, infectious or toxic exposures.

immunisation.description: Relevant vaccination history and up-to-date status.

other.description: Any other relevant patient-reported subjective information.

vital_signs.description: Measured/reported vitals: HR, BP, temp, RR, SpO2.

examination.description: Physical or mental state examination findings, including system-specific exams.

completed_investigations.description: Only COMPLETED investigations with explicitly mentioned results. Do NOT include planned/ordered tests.

assessment_and_plan.description: One block per issue/request/problem explicitly identified. Numbered sequentially at render time.

issue.description: Issue, request, problem or condition name.

diagnosis.description: Diagnosis ONLY if explicitly stated by the clinician. Never infer or create one.

differential_diagnoses.description: Only if explicitly listed. Do not generate possibilities.

investigations_planned.description: Investigations/tests the clinician stated will be arranged.

treatment_planned.description: Therapies, medications or interventions the clinician explicitly stated will be initiated.

referrals.description: Referrals to specialists/allied health/community services explicitly stated.

medications_mentioned.description: Medications asserted anywhere in the note (for the NER cross-check). Not rendered.
